commands.purpose: Table view of teams. Filterable by tenant, branch, organization, team_type, sport_key, status. --include-archived shows archived rows; default hides them.
Verbose read of one team: base fields + schedule_pattern (day-by-day summary) + active roster count + pending trial count + upcoming event count + trailing-30-day retention rollup.
Scriptable team creation (test harness + tenant onboarding). --dry-run validates the input against every observer rule without persisting.
Mark a team as the branch's default (rare — used only when tenants want a general catch-all team; observer auto-demotes previous default).
Transition team to status='paused'. New trials + roster adds refused; existing members continue.
Transition paused team back to status='active'.
Terminal transition. Refused when active members exist unless --cascade-members is passed (which sets every active member to status='inactive' with left_reason='team_archived').
Set registration_opens_at + registration_closes_at. Publishes TeamRegistrationOpened notification to eligible members based on age + gender.
Force-close registration ahead of schedule. Sets registration_closes_at = now() and clears registration_opens_at when it's in the future.
List roster rows for a team. Default status=active; pass 'all' to see historic + terminal rows.
Add a member to a team's roster. Runs the full observer check chain: uniqueness, tenant-match, capacity, age/gender eligibility.
Transition roster row to status='inactive' with left_reason. Preserves historic row.
Change role_on_team (player / captain / vice_captain / coach / assistant_coach / team_manager / medical / analyst / substitute).
Transition member to status='injured'. Coach-visible notes optional.
Transition member to status='graduated'. Terminal for this team.
List trials for a team. Filter by status + date range.
Schedule a trial. Either an athlete/user reference OR anonymous profile (first-name + phone required for anonymous).
Transition trial to status='completed'. Coach writes evaluation_notes; decision (convert/reject) is a separate action.
Atomic conversion: transition trial to status='converted' AND create TeamMember row in the same transaction. Refused on uniqueness violation (rolls back the whole conversion).
Transition trial to status='rejected'. decision_notes is a required audit field for anti-discrimination review; not exposed in analytics.
Cancel a pending trial (before it starts). Applies to status IN scheduled / in_progress.
List event participations for a team.
Register team for an event. Wave 3 event_id becomes required + FK-constrained; Wave 2 allows nullable placeholder.
Withdraw from event. Sets withdrew_at + withdrawal_reason.
Mark team as checked in at the event. Sets checked_in_at.
Record the event result JSONB blob. --result accepts a JSON path or inline JSON.
